task: Fixed a 401 bug in artifacts/forge-erp where the orval API client could not authenticate to /api when the app was loaded in the Replit workspace iframe. Cause: in dev mode Clerk session cookies are SameSite=Lax, which browsers block in cross-site iframe contexts (server returned 401 with x-clerk-auth-reason: dev-browser-missing on every /api/auth/me call). Fix: added a ClerkAuthTokenBridge component in artifacts/forge-erp/src/App.tsx that calls setAuthTokenGetter (from @workspace/api-client-react) with a getter wrapping Clerk's useAuth().getToken(). Also added a one-shot queryClient.invalidateQueries() when the user becomes signed-in for the first time so any /auth/me query that ran before the bridge mounted is retried. The api-server's @clerk/express getAuth(req) already accepts Bearer tokens, so no backend changes were needed. Please review for correctness, race conditions in the token bridge, and any concerns about the picker code paths (artifacts/forge-erp/src/pages/picking/lib/api.ts) which still use raw fetch with credentials:include and may have the same issue when accessed from inside the workspace iframe.
